title: TrashBinned
body:
# Update 2.0:
So I was playing my modpack and after deleting a very important item by accident (Oof) I realised that this mod is very dangerous the way it is, so i've made some changes to acomodate this:
![trashbin](https://i.imgur.com/6aoYk5Z.gif)



Now to use the trash bin you have to open the lid first. Just right click empty handed to open it, throw the unwanted items and close the lid with a empty handed right click.

Simple, Intuitive and Immersive.

You can hold left cntrl to throw out the whole pack in your hand.

 

All models are reworked and have a new lid.

## **And please don't forget to check out my other mods**
